private_text_1: Experience Luminary in an intimate setting for up to 24 guests. Our private dining room offers a secluded sanctuary where celestial elegance meets personalized service, perfect for milestone celebrations, corporate dinners, or special family gatherings.
private_text_2: Work directly with Chef Elena to craft a bespoke tasting menu tailored to your preferences. Our dedicated events team ensures seamless execution, from wine pairings to custom floral arrangements. Pricing begins at $185 per person for a five course experience.
hosting_text_1: Transform your special event into an unforgettable celebration with our full venue buyout. We accommodate up to 80 guests for seated dinners or 120 for cocktail receptions, perfect for wedding receptions, product launches, charity galas, and milestone celebrations.
hosting_text_2: Our event hosting includes comprehensive planning support from concept to coordination. Choose from our signature menu or collaborate with our culinary team to create custom dishes. We partner with premier vendors for florals, entertainment, and audiovisual needs. Contact our events team at events@luminary.com to begin planning.
